name: studio.create_site
description: Create an empty Actium Studio site without the natural-language scaffolder. Returns the new site_id and URL. Power-user path for callers that will drive pages explicitly.
whenToUse: Caller has a site name and optional template but does NOT want the LLM-driven scaffolder to author content.
Integration test or CI scenario that needs a deterministic empty-site starting point.
Bulk provisioning flow where scaffolding would exceed the LLM budget for each site.
whenNotToUse: Caller wants generated landing-page content from a brief — use studio.scaffold_site (hero skill) instead.
A site with the requested slug already exists — call studio.list_sites first and reuse the existing site_id.
Caller is in autonomous mode without operator budget approval — create_site can be billed against the plan tier.
